member.name: Mr Adnan Hussain
member.synopsis: Mr Adnan Hussain is the Independent MP for Blackburn , and has been an MP continually since 4 July 2024.

writtenQuestions.heading: Inaayah Makda
writtenQuestions.questionText: To ask the Secretary of State for the Home Department, if she will make UK police resources available to liaise with the Moroccan authorities in relation to the disappearance of Inaayah Makda in Casablanca on 28 January 2026; and what discussions she has

writtenQuestions.heading: Trastuzumab Deruxtecan
writtenQuestions.questionText: To ask the Secretary of State for Health and Social Care, what assessment his Department has made of the potential impact of NICE's severity modifier on the availability of Enhertu for patients with secondary breast cancer.
writtenQuestions.answerText: The National Institute for Health and Care Excellence (NICE) considered the impact of its severity modifier as part of its appraisal of Enhertu for HER2-low metastatic breast cancer. However, even with the severity weighting applied, NICE concluded that t...

writtenQuestions.heading: Electric Bikes and Electric Scooters: Lancashire
writtenQuestions.questionText: To ask the Secretary of State for the Home Department, what steps she is taking to help tackle the (a) anti-social behaviour and (b) dangers associated with the use of electric (i) scooters and (ii) bikes in (A) Blackburn and (B) Lancashire.
writtenQuestions.answerText: Tackling anti-social behaviour is a top priority for this Government, and a key part of our Safer Streets Mission to take back our streets.​We will put thousands of neighbourhood police and community support officers into local communities and crack down ...

writtenQuestions.heading: Cancer: Radiotherapy
writtenQuestions.questionText: To ask the Secretary of State for Health and Social Care, what assessment he has made of the potential merits of including a targeted additional dose of radiotherapy within the National Cancer Plan.
writtenQuestions.answerText: No assessment has been made. This Government’s Health Mission will aim to make progress against major diseases, including cancer.The NHS Long-Term Plan sets out the National Health Service’s key ambitions on cancer to increase the number of cancers diagno...
writtenQuestions.answeringBody: Department of Health and Social Care

writtenQuestions.heading: Government Departments: Facilities
writtenQuestions.questionText: To ask the Minister for the Cabinet Office, whether he plans to take step increase the insourcing of facilities management services in Government departments and agencies.
writtenQuestions.answerText: Government Departments aim to secure value for money in meeting their facilities management requirements. The evaluation of either an in-house, outsourced, or a delivery model which is a combination of insourced and outsourced components will be evaluated...
